name: @emilia-protocol/attest
description: Verify an agent identity (SHA-256 vs a known-good hash) and sign a work product as an offline-verifiable EP-RECEIPT-v1. The standardized, drop-in version of the Identity-Manager pattern: re-hash the identity, re-hash the work, check the Ed25519 signature and EP-MERKLE-v2 anchor with @emilia-protocol/verify. No server, no trust in the issuer.
author: EMILIA Protocol, Inc.
